blended.narrative: Eldora is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 8,367 ft. Strong winds with gusts to 45 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: clear skies, highs of 47°F, gusts to 45 mph.
Tomorrow: 3.6" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: dry, highs of 45°F, winds around 21 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 7" over the past week. Current depth: 32".
